name: ai-workflow
description: The AI-agent software workflow: 20 skills covering the full lifecycle - idea validation (roast), research (storm-research), intent elicitation (grill), prototyping, spec-to-issues, session bookends (resume/handoff), test-first building (tdd), review (code-review-pass, simplify, verify), diagnosis, design (codebase-design, domain-modeling, improve-codebase-architecture), and self-audits (doc-audit, harness-audit). v0.2 adds golden-thread traceability (from Rik Dryfoos/HomeFlow).
